creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
This is a port for the sms1xxx driver, a driver for Siano-based USB DVB devices.

The following devices have been successfully tested :

- Terratec Cinergy Piranha DVB-T USB Dongle
- Hauppauge WinTV MiniStick (HD)

See http://contribs.martymac.org/FreeBSD-siano/README for more details.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
